policy: Editorial checklists replace ad hoc reference lists. apaReferences remains empty in the database until each checklist row is completed with a retrieved, verified source. No fabricated DOI, PMID, or APA 7 strings.

editorialChecklist.task: Run PubMed search: heart failure pulmonary edema pathophysiology review; select peer-reviewed review; record PMID and year.
Retrieve ACC or AHA HF guideline acute decompensated HF section; record exact edition and chapter for future apaReferences.
Confirm pathophysiology claims against program-approved med-surg or pathophysiology textbook chapter.
Optional: attach local oxygen titration and rapid response policy as non-journal appendix if cited in public copy.
Retrieve ADA Standards of Care DKA and hyperglycemic crises section; record year.
PubMed: diabetic ketoacidosis potassium management; pick one review; PMID.
Verify insulin-potassium shift teaching against textbook mechanism figure if used.
Align any numeric K+ threshold in practice Q with institutional protocol or remove number.
Select society hyponatremia guideline or consensus; record edition.
PubMed: SIADH hyponatremia; one review; PMID.
Cross-check volume-status teaching with fluids textbook and SIADH vs hypovolemia table.
Verify drug examples (SSRI, carbamazepine) against current drug info if expanded in copy.
ACC or AHA HF guideline: presentation and hemodynamics; record edition.
PubMed: left heart failure pulmonary congestion; one mechanism source; PMID.
Confirm L vs R vs biventricular framing with med-surg cardiac chapter.
Textbook: Starling forces and edema formation; page reference for apaReferences.
PubMed: hypoalbuminemia edema pathophysiology; one review; PMID.
If nephrotic or hepatic emphasis added later, add disease-specific guideline or chapter citation.
Surviving Sepsis summary or current society sepsis bundle source; record year.
PubMed: sepsis pathophysiology fever tachycardia; PMID.
Remove or qualify any bundle timing claim if not sourced.
Textbook acid-base chapter used by partner schools; verify compensation timelines.
PubMed: respiratory alkalosis hyperventilation; PMID if citing secondary source.
GOLD report excerpt for oxygen in exacerbation; record year and section.
PubMed: COPD hypercapnia oxygen therapy; PMID.
Ensure oxygen titration wording matches cited GOLD year before publish.
Lexicomp or equivalent digoxin monograph; record access date for citation.
PubMed: digoxin toxicity management; one review; PMID.
Strip or qualify any antidote dosing from blog unless peer-reviewed protocol attached.
TBI or neurocritical care guideline for ICP management; record society and year.
PubMed: mannitol ICP electrolytes; PMID.
Verify mannitol concentration and compatibility statements with institutional pharmacy manual.
